name: @coodra/contextos-cli
description: ContextOS CLI — single-binary install/configure/run/diagnose surface for solo and team modes. Module 08a.

scripts.//build: Two-phase build (decision dec_83ba10c1, 2026-05-02). tsc emits .d.ts + the loose `dist/lib/outbox/*.js` files that workspace consumers (apps in dev) import via the `@coodra/contextos-cli/lib/outbox` exports entry. Then `scripts/bundle.mjs` runs esbuild to OVERWRITE `dist/index.js` with a self-contained bundle (workspace + npm deps inlined) and writes the bundled apps under `dist/runtime/{mcp-server,hooks-bridge}/` so `npm i -g @coodra/contextos-cli` ships everything needed. Externals: better-sqlite3 + sqlite-vec (native).

//dependencies: Only true npm-resolvable runtime deps live here (decision dec_83ba10c1). Native modules are kept external from the bundle so they install correctly per platform; everything else is inlined. Workspace deps + bundleable npm deps moved to devDependencies so `pnpm publish` / `npm install` of the published tarball does not try to resolve `workspace:*` placeholders.
//devDependencies: Phase 3 Fix E (2026-05-02): @coodra/contextos-{mcp-server,hooks-bridge} were previously declared here so the bundle.mjs script's esbuild could resolve their imports via cli's node_modules. They were removed because pnpm + turbo treats devDependencies as ^build edges, and apps/{mcp-server,hooks-bridge} also declare @coodra/contextos-cli (for /lib/outbox), which produced a build-time cycle that turbo refused to schedule. esbuild reads apps/{mcp-server,hooks-bridge}/src/index.ts via absolute filesystem paths and resolves their transitive imports through the workspace-root node_modules — no cli-local dep declaration is needed.
